title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Confirmed both pending occurrence dates with the owner via transcript evidence (TRACE3 standup opens 'Happy Monday' and 2026-07-20 is a Monday; Kushali call references completed runs for the 21st/22nd with a Jul 22 11:31 mtime). Retired the two reviewed superseded low-confidence request pairs (e9d2e88b, ea79b399), minted fresh manual-confidence date-bound requests under an explicit development override, ran dedicated session extraction agents for both, validated both provider responses (valid, development_override readiness), and completed phase-2 ingests: TRACE3 Daily Stand-Up Post-MVP 2026-07-20 (markdown + 7 signals, mtg-20260720-42840eae) and Budget Pipeline Reconciliation Call with G, Kushali 2026-07-22 (markdown + 5 signals, mtg-20260722-18cde3f6). Both archived and reconciled; inbox now 0 files, 0 handoffs; one iQ capture recorded per meeting. Extraction grounding rules (verbatim raw_labels, proposal-vs-agreement, no causal overstatement) were briefed to both agents; TRACE3 correctly recorded 0 decisions as proposals-only.
blockers: No corpus adoption or mutation is authorized; a deterministic fingerprinted adoption plan requires later owner approval.
open_questions: Decide when to begin the separately planned Semantic Integrity Guardrails work after the Approved Runtime track.
next_actions: Close the legacy-source dedup safety note so a source represented only by a deprecated ledger record cannot be silently re-ingested, add regression coverage, rerun the full suite and read-only review; then finalize, commit, and push the compatibility hotfix excluding volatile runtime files; then resume Approved Runtime Track 1 Task 7 (persist canonical runtime provenance with provenance-era schema boundaries and doctor linkage checks).
